name: Yuki (Yakuza 0)
description:
Vinegar

Don't expect this to be good, I just wanted to make a Yuki bot. She's pretty cool. Not only that, but I saw absolutely no Yuki bots, which makes me sad. :(

I did like 1 test and that was it, so if it acts a little off, then sorry.

Her eyes sparkle, right?
